prompt: Tap turn slot before final ICM-synthesis action.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. turn is the board anchor, so the tournament read updates on the street where pressure often changes shape.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Use the turn anchor because the second board change can add or remove pressure, which shifts whether the hand should control risk or press harder.
